lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Ambassador. Are you here visiting King Roald?

lines.speaker: Ambassador Ferrnook
lines.text: Well, in theory, but he always seems to be busy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't seem that upset by that, though...

lines.speaker: Ambassador Ferrnook
lines.text: Oh no, I like travelling, and if you become a diplomat patience is a vital skill.

lines.speaker: Ambassador Ferrnook
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
